🔒 100% private — no upload

Convert HEIC to JPG on Windows

Free, private, and instant — right in your browser.

Drag & drop your HEIC files here

🔒 Converted in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.

Windows can't open HEIC out of the box — it asks you to buy the HEVC codec from the Microsoft Store. Skip that entirely. This converter decodes HEIC in your browser on any Windows PC, so you get JPG files without paying for a codec or installing software.

How to convert

  1. Open this page in Edge, Chrome, or Firefox on Windows.
  2. Drag your HEIC files into the box.
  3. Download the converted JPGs.

FAQ

Do I need the paid HEVC extension?

No. Because we decode HEIC in the browser, you don't need any Windows codec or store purchase.

Related converters

HEIC to JPGHEIC to PNGPNG to JPGWEBP to JPG

VaultConvert — free file converters that run entirely in your browser. Your files never leave your device.
